subject: [PATCH v10 15/15] Documentation/userfaultfd: document RWP working set tracking

2026-07-08.patch_summary: This patch adds documentation to the Linux kernel's admin guide on userfaultfd (UFFD) working set tracking, specifically covering read-write protection (RWP). It explains the sync and async fault models, UFFDIO_RWPROTECT semantics, and UFFD_FEATURE_RWP_ASYNC. The documentation also covers a typical virtual machine (VMM) workflow for working-set-tracking from detection to eviction and back to asynchronous mode.
